name: Medium Modern Industrial Assembled Table Lamp Black - Threshold™: UL Listed, Cotton-Linen Shade, Metal Body, No Bulb Included
description: Instantly illuminate any room of your house with the Medium Modern Industrial Assembled Table Lamp from Threshold™. At 20.25 inches tall, this accent lamp stands atop a tapered open-frame metal base in black for industrial flair, while the drum-style fabric shade adds a cozy feel. Place on an end table or nightstand to complete the look of your space.
